privileged_info_summary: The task runs a local Jitsi Meet instance (version stable-9753) on http://localhost:8080. The meeting room URL is /virtual-fitness-class. The task involves two participants with synthetic names: FitnessCoach (moderator) and ClassHelper (participant). The expected evidence is a screenshot saved to /home/ga/moderator_granted.png showing ClassHelper with moderator rights. The task timeout is 480 seconds. Jitsi is configured with authentication disabled (ENABLE_AUTH=0) to allow guest access. Firefox is pre-configured to grant microphone/camera permissions without prompts. The VLM verifier checks for: two participants visible, moderator context menu interaction, grant action execution, and final moderator status confirmation on ClassHelper.
